sutta: once while the exalted 1 was dwelling in alavi surrounded by 500 lay disciples came and saluted and sat down at 1 side and the exalted 1 said to him seated there this following of your sataka is very large how do you manage to gather it together and he said lord it is by those 4 bases of gatherings which have been declared by the exalted 1 and i gather this following together lord when i realize that this man may be enlisted by a gift i enlist him in this way when by a kindly word then in that way when by a good turn then so or when i know that he must be treated as an equal if he is to be enlisted then i enlist him by equality of treatment moreover lord there is wealth in my family and they know that such is not rumored of a poor man and the buddha said well done well done this is just the way to gather together a large following whosoever in the past gathered together a large following did so on these 4 bases likewise whosoever shall do so in the future yes whosoever now gathers a following together gathers it on these 4 places then hataka of alabi being instructed stimulated aroused and gladdened by the exalted ones dhamma discourse rose from his seat saluted him and departed passing him by on his right now not long after the departure of hataka the exalted 1 addressed the monk saying holy true amongst that hathaka of allahis is endowed with 8 marvelous and wonderful qualities of allah is conscientious hathaka of alavi has a sense of remorse hathaka of alabi is a great listener hathaka of alabi is charitable hathaka of alabi is wise is modest monks only true that is so endowed this is another 1 quite well known disciple a disciple of the buddha and also supposed to be an anagami the fruition arya and the nexus is
